title: Japanese prospect Rintaro Sasaki signs with the Miami Marlins
summary: The young hitter, recruited by the Marlins after being selected by the SoftBank Hawks, decides to start his professional career in the United States.

title: Argentina and Spain face off in the World Cup final after 60 years
summary: The match will determine whether Argentina achieves back-to-back championships or Spain returns to the top after four editions.

title: Man falls from 12-story building and kills a woman in Nagoya
summary: The fatal victim was walking on the sidewalk when she was hit by the man who fell, who was seriously injured.

title: 20-meter tree falls on a soccer field in Shizuoka, injuring 7
summary: Among those affected are children and parents watching the game; they were taken to the hospital with no serious injuries.

title: Torrential rains in Tochigi cause landslide with one woman dead and missing persons
summary: A 60-year-old woman was found dead under a collapsed house; her husband remains missing.

title: Fire on a fishing boat off the coast of Kanagawa forces evacuation of entire crew
summary: The occupants were rescued without injuries and the vessel sank after the incident.

title: Ukraine attacks Russian warehouses with drones, causing millions in losses
summary: The bombing of a logistics center of a Russian e-commerce company caused an estimated 100 billion yen in damages.

title: US launches airstrikes on Iranian targets in retaliation for the death of two soldiers
summary: The airstrikes, which lasted for eight consecutive days, are intended to respond to the drone attack in Jordan.

title: Ten years after the Yamayuri En massacre, reflections on discrimination and social security
summary: Commemorative articles analyze the impact of the attack that killed 45 people and the shortcomings of the welfare system for the disabled.

title: SpaceX's 'Starbase' project in Texas creates jobs and tourism but also criticism
summary: One year after the creation of the municipality around the SpaceX plant, residents report coexistence and environmental problems.

title: World Cup final ticket prices reach record highs
summary: With skyrocketing demand, minimum prices have become exorbitant, drawing strong criticism from fans.

title: England beats France 6-4 and takes third place in the World Cup
summary: In a high-scoring match, the English secured the bronze with a hat-trick from Bukayo Saka.

title: Osaka Toin, spring champion, eliminated in Osaka baseball tournament
summary: The favorite team fell to Ritsumeikan school, frustrating its attempt to win three consecutive spring and summer titles.

title: Japan's Defense Minister Minoru Koumura travels to Europe to discuss fighter jets and nuclear weapons
summary: The visit includes an air show and discussions on the joint development of the next fighter jet.

title: Earthquake in Venezuela leaves more than 5,000 dead
summary: The large-magnitude earthquake devastated several regions of the country, causing a humanitarian catastrophe.

title: New York mayor considers arresting Benjamin Netanyahu during his UN visit
summary: The move responds to an International Criminal Court arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.

title: Hungarian parliament dismisses president accused of being Viktor Orbán's 'puppet'
summary: The decision ends the head of state's term amid criticism over his closeness to the prime minister.

title: Papua New Guinea closes Taiwan's representative office in favor of One China policy
summary: The Chinese government praised the decision, which represents a new diplomatic setback for Taiwan.

title: ICC President Akane Tomoko defends court's integrity against Trump's pressure
summary: In a statement, she affirmed that the court will fulfill its mission despite threats of dismantlement by the US administration.

title: South Korea to ban social media use for children under 14
summary: The new law restricts account creation and access to short videos to protect children.
